fields.name: 4x4-edge-pairing-from-top
fields.description: Wings are in top middle on left and bottom middle on right pair appears on right side

fields.name: 4x4-edge-flip
fields.algorithm: R U R' F R' F' R
fields.description: Right side needs to be flipped to before pairing

fields.name: 4x4-last-two-edges
fields.algorithm: Uw R U R' F R' F' R Uw'

fields.name: 4x4-edge-pairing-from-bottom
fields.description: Wings are in bottom middle on left and top middle on right pair appears on right side
